'''zhachuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:myasthenia|myasthenia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:myasthenia|myasthenia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhachuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæchiyith|zhæchiyith]] || [[word:zhæchiyij|zhæchiyij]] || [[word:zhæchiyish|zhæchiyish]] || [[word:zhæchiyi|zhæchiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhachuchuyuth|zhachuchuyuth]] || [[word:zhachuchuyuj|zhachuchuyuj]] || [[word:zhachuchuyush|zhachuchuyush]] || [[word:zhachuchuyu|zhachuchuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhachuyuth|zhachuyuth]] || [[word:zhachuyuj|zhachuyuj]] || [[word:zhachuyush|zhachuyush]] || [[word:zhachuyu|zhachuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhachufyufth|zhachufyufth]] || [[word:zhachufyufj|zhachufyufj]] || [[word:zhachufyufsh|zhachufyufsh]] || [[word:zhachufyuf|zhachufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhachuyuthu|zhachuyuthu]] || [[word:zhachuyuju|zhachuyuju]] || [[word:zhachuyushu|zhachuyushu]] || [[word:zhachuyuku|zhachuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhachuyuth|zhachuyuth]] || [[word:zhachuyuj|zhachuyuj]] || [[word:zhachuyush|zhachuyush]] || [[word:zhachuyu|zhachuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhachuyuthul|zhachuyuthul]] || [[word:zhachuyujul|zhachuyujul]] || [[word:zhachuyushul|zhachuyushul]] || [[word:zhachuyukul|zhachuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhachuyuuthuthu|zhachuyuuthuthu]] || [[word:zhachuyuujuju|zhachuyuujuju]] || [[word:zhachuyuushushu|zhachuyuushushu]] || [[word:zhachuyuuku|zhachuyuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhachuyuthun|zhachuyuthun]] || [[word:zhachuyujun|zhachuyujun]] || [[word:zhachuyushun|zhachuyushun]] || [[word:zhachuyukun|zhachuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhachuyuthuoro|zhachuyuthuoro]] || [[word:zhachuyujuoro|zhachuyujuoro]] || [[word:zhachuyushuoro|zhachuyushuoro]] || [[word:zhachuyukuoro|zhachuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
